extraction_notes: React SPA — CSS-in-JS (styled-components) prevented WebFetch extraction. Brand DNA sourced directly from design tokens, component JSX, and index.html. High confidence.

typography.pairing_descriptor: Single-font system using Montserrat across all weights — bold (800) for display headings, semi-bold (600) for subheadings, regular/medium (400–500) for body copy

imagery.composition: Clean/minimal, light backgrounds with generous white space; device hero shots centered with no clutter
forbidden: generic stock photos of loose pills

target_audience.profession: Healthcare facility administrators, hospital managers, pharmacy owners, environmental compliance officers; secondary audience: general Romanian public responsible for home medicine disposal
pain_points: No clear guidance or infrastructure for proper medicine disposal
Environmental contamination — 1,500 medicines per year enter Romanian waterways
Collection rates 30x below European average with no scalable solution
Manual, unsafe contact with hazardous pharmaceutical waste in collection facilities
aspirations: Contribute to a measurably cleaner Romania and protect biodiversity
Achieve regulatory compliance with hazardous pharmaceutical waste standards
Automate and secure the entire collection-to-reporting pipeline
Simplify individual responsibility for medicine disposal into one easy step
